dict.string: en
CAREN Alert
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
$(PRODUCT_NAME)
APPL
$(MARKETING_VERSION)
$(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION)
LaunchScreen
Main
CAREN Alert uses your camera to record video during roadside incidents and police encounters for your legal protection.
CAREN Alert uses your microphone to record audio during emergencies and to enable hands-free voice commands.
CAREN Alert saves recorded video evidence to your photo library so you can access and share it later.
CAREN Alert saves recorded video evidence to your photo library so you can access and share it later.
CAREN Alert uses your location to identify your state's specific legal rights and share your GPS coordinates during emergencies.
CAREN Alert uses your location in the background to detect emergencies and alert your contacts with your exact position.
CAREN Alert accesses your contacts so you can quickly add emergency contacts to notify during an incident.
CAREN Alert uses Bluetooth to connect to earpiece devices for hands-free voice commands during emergencies.
CAREN Alert uses Bluetooth to connect to earpiece devices for hands-free voice commands during emergencies.
CAREN Alert uses Face ID to securely authenticate your identity before accessing protected features.
